# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_80
    address:
      socket_address:
        protocol: HTTP
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@': envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: http
          codec_type: AUTO
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: /api/v1/users
                route:
                  cluster: users_cluster
              - match:
                  prefix: /api/v1/products
                route:
                  cluster: products_cluster

  clusters:
  - name: users_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: users-service
        port_value: 8080
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: users_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
          endpoint:
          - address:
              socket_address:
                protocol: TCP
                address: users-service
                port_value: 8080

  - name: products_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: products-service
        port_value: 8080
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: products_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
          endpoint:
          - address:
              socket_address:
                protocol: TCP
                address: products-service
                port_value: 8080

  - name: users_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: users-service
        port_value: 8080

  - name: products_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: products-service
        port_value: 8080

  - name: envoy_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: envoy-service
        port_value: 8001
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: envoy_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
          endpoint:
          - address:
              socket_address:
                protocol: TCP
                address: envoy-service
                port_value: 8001

  - name: envoy_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: envoy-service
        port_value: 8001

  - name: external_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: external-service
        port_value: 8080
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: external_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
          endpoint:
          - address:
              socket_address:
                protocol: TCP
                address: external-service
                port_value: 8080

  - name: external_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: external-service
        port_value: 8080
